meta.trajectory_quality_reason: Explore subagent's tool calls are not enumerable from the parent's perspective; only the final answer string is visible. Wall-clock is measurable; tool-call sequence and per-tool token counts are not.
meta.comparison_note: Single-question run cited 1 file vs the 4 files the showcase v1 run cited for this question — the smoke run is not directly comparable to the curated full-batch baseline; useful as a harness-adapter validation only.
